description: Enterprise annotation operations dashboard. Annotation volume analytics, API performance, storage management, deployment tracking, and annotation hygiene monitoring. Enables admins to manage annotation sprawl and ensure deployment markers are working correctly.

panels.description: Annotation API endpoint availability. Percentage of non-5xx responses. Below 99% requires investigation — annotation writes may be failing silently.
panels.title: Annotation API Availability

panels.description: Total annotation API request throughput. Includes creates, reads, updates, and deletes.
panels.title: Annotation Requests/s

panels.description: 99th percentile annotation API latency. Values above 2s indicate database contention or large annotation payloads.
panels.title: Annotation API P99 Latency

panels.description: Annotation API error rate. Any non-zero value indicates failed annotation operations.
panels.title: Annotation API Errors/s

panels.description: Rate of new annotation creations (POST requests). Spikes indicate deployment waves or automated annotation writes.
panels.title: Annotation Write Rate

panels.description: Rate of annotation reads (GET requests). High values indicate dashboards with many annotation queries — can impact load time.
panels.title: Annotation Read Rate

panels.description: Annotation API response time percentiles. Gradual increase indicates growing annotation volume impacting DB queries.
panels.title: Annotation API Latency Over Time

panels.description: Annotation API traffic breakdown by HTTP method. POST=create, GET=read, DELETE=remove, PATCH=update.
panels.title: Annotation API Throughput by Method

panels.description: Annotation creation rate over time. Spikes correlate with deployment activity, CI/CD pipelines, or automated annotation tools.
panels.title: Annotation Writes Over Time

panels.description: Annotation read rate. Correlates with dashboard load activity. Heavy annotation usage on popular dashboards can degrade performance.
panels.title: Annotation Reads Over Time

panels.description: Annotation API errors by HTTP status code. 400=bad request, 401/403=auth issues, 500+=server errors.
panels.title: Annotation Errors by Status Code

panels.description: Annotation API error rate as percentage of total requests. Above 1% warrants investigation, above 5% is critical.
panels.title: Annotation API Error Rate %

panels.description: Most active annotation API handlers. Identifies which annotation endpoints are receiving the most traffic.
panels.title: Top Annotation Handlers by Request Volume

panels.description: Slowest annotation API handlers by P99 latency. Candidates for database query optimization or annotation cleanup.
panels.title: Top Annotation Handlers by Latency

panels.description: Annotation creation activity overlaid as a proxy for deployment and incident marker activity. Use Grafana's native annotation overlay to see actual annotation content.
panels.title: Deployment Annotations

panels.description: Database query latency for annotation operations. Increasing latency indicates growing annotation table size — consider implementing annotation cleanup policies.
panels.title: Grafana DB Query Duration (Annotation Queries)

panels.description: Grafana process memory usage. Correlate with annotation volume — large annotation result sets increase memory pressure.
panels.title: Grafana Instance Memory

panels.description: Total annotation writes in the selected time range. Use for capacity planning and annotation retention policy decisions.
panels.title: Annotation Operations Summary

panels.description: Total annotation deletions in the selected time range. Low delete rates combined with high write rates indicate annotation sprawl.
panels.title: Annotation Deletes

panels.description: Ratio of annotation writes to deletes. High ratios (>100:1) indicate annotations accumulating without cleanup. Consider implementing retention policies.
panels.title: Write/Delete Ratio

title: Grafana Annotations — Admin & Analytics
